tasks.deploy:storefront-api:test: deno run -A npm:esbuild scripts/storefront-api/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --external:@bunny.net/edgescript-sdk "--external:node:*" --outfile=dist/storefront-api.js && deno run --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env --env-file=.env scripts/storefront-api/deploy.ts
tasks.deploy:storefront-api:prod: deno run -A npm:esbuild scripts/storefront-api/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --external:@bunny.net/edgescript-sdk "--external:node:*" --outfile=dist/storefront-api.js && deno run --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env --env-file=.env.prod scripts/storefront-api/deploy.ts
tasks.build:storefront:test: cd storefront && npx astro build --mode staging
tasks.deploy:storefront:test: cd storefront && npx astro build --mode staging && cd .. && deno run --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env --env-file=.env scripts/deploy-storefront/main.ts
tasks.deploy:storefront:prod: cd storefront && npm run build && cd .. && deno run --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env --env-file=.env.prod scripts/deploy-storefront/main.ts
